positive: A vintage 1970s style psychedelic poster design featuring stylized retro lettering that reads 'Good Vibes Only' surrounded by swirling paisley patterns, warm earth tones (mustard yellow, burnt orange, forest green), distressed texture, screen-print aesthetic, highly saturated, maximalist.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern, minimalist, digital art, clean vector
